sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115465" key="yeudhgori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδηγορ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n115465.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">false discourse, lying,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
